cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about the story "The First Hello". The question is asking what the process of fitting a working telephone booth was. Looking at the text: The first paragraph says, "It was a year ago that the phone line had been installed, six months later men from the public works department had come to put up the phone booth..." So the phone line was installed a year ago, then six months later the booth was put up. That means the booth was installed 1.5 years after the phone line started.
